response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience with enterprise-grade systems, strong JVM-related skills (Java, C++), and a proven ability to work with large-scale codebases. However, his recent focus has been on TypeScript, Node.js, and AI tooling rather than Java/Kotlin enterprise IDE tooling. His lack of explicit IDE development experience and limited recent JVM specialization slightly reduces his fit for this role.
strengths: Strong background in enterprise systems and large-scale codebases (Shopify, Stripe)
Proven expertise in JVM languages (Java, C++) and system-level tooling
Demonstrated ability to take ownership of complex projects and drive innovation
concerns: Limited recent experience with Java/Kotlin enterprise IDE tooling or JVM internals
Primary focus in recent roles has been on TypeScript/Node.js rather than JVM ecosystems
No clear evidence of IDE internals or language tooling contributions in public work
